title: hieracium bicolor subsp. trichodermum
intro: Hieracium bicolor subsp. trichodermum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Hieracium bicolor subsp. trichodermum include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
